action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 6 crashed due to JSON serialization of float32 in log_metric. Model trained 1 epoch, val_loss=0.6359, huge negative R². Train_loss decreasing (0.49→0.36) shows model learns weighted loss. Analysis: JSON fix needed to continue training; the crash prevented checkpoint saving and eval. Weighted loss seems to produce huge val loss because low-variance dims have high weight and model can't fit them well yet. Need longer training (15 epochs) with proper serialization. Decision: Fix JSON serialization (convert numpy types to native), re-run training for 15 epochs, then submit eval.
